name: immich
description: Photo and video backup with search, AI features, and a built-in database stack

fields.name: IMMICH_PORT
fields.label: App Port
fields.help: The web app will open on this host port.

fields.name: DB_USERNAME
fields.label: Database User
fields.help: Database username used by Immich and Postgres.

fields.name: DB_PASSWORD
fields.label: Database Password
fields.help:
Choose a strong database password.
This stack will use it for the built-in Postgres service.

fields.name: DB_DATABASE_NAME
fields.label: Database Name
fields.help: Main Postgres database name for Immich.

fields.name: UPLOAD_LOCATION
fields.label: Library Folder
fields.help: Host path where Immich stores uploaded photos and videos.

fields.name: DB_DATA_LOCATION
fields.label: Database Folder
fields.help:
Host path for the Postgres database files.
Use a Linux-compatible filesystem with proper ownership support.

fields.name: MODEL_CACHE_LOCATION
fields.label: Model Cache Folder
fields.help: Host path for machine-learning model cache files.

fields.name: IMMICH_RESTART_POLICY
fields.label: Restart Policy
fields.help: Controls whether the Immich services restart automatically.

fields.name: TZ
fields.label: Timezone
fields.help: Optional timezone such as Asia/Dubai or Etc/UTC.

fields.name: IMMICH_SERVER_IMAGE
fields.label: Server Image
fields.help:
Docker image used for the main Immich server.
Immich recommends using the current release image, not the main branch compose file.

fields.name: IMMICH_ML_IMAGE
fields.label: Machine Learning Image
fields.help:
Docker image used for the Immich machine-learning service.
You can change the tag later for hardware-accelerated variants if your host supports them.

fields.name: IMMICH_SERVER_HEALTHCHECK_DISABLED
fields.label: Disable Server Healthcheck
fields.help: Usually leave this disabled flag set to No.

fields.name: IMMICH_ML_HEALTHCHECK_DISABLED
fields.label: Disable Machine Learning Healthcheck
fields.help: Usually leave this disabled flag set to No.

fields.name: IMMICH_DB_HEALTHCHECK_DISABLED
fields.label: Disable Database Healthcheck
fields.help: Usually leave this disabled flag set to No.

fields.name: IMMICH_EXTRA_MOUNT_1
fields.label: Extra Mount 1
fields.help: Optional extra bind mount for the main Immich server in the format /host/path:/container/path or /host/path:/container/path:ro.

fields.name: IMMICH_EXTRA_MOUNT_2
fields.label: Extra Mount 2
fields.help: Optional extra bind mount for the main Immich server in the format /host/path:/container/path or /host/path:/container/path:ro.

fields.name: IMMICH_EXTRA_MOUNT_3
fields.label: Extra Mount 3
fields.help: Optional extra bind mount for the main Immich server in the format /host/path:/container/path or /host/path:/container/path:ro.

fields.name: IMMICH_EXTRA_MOUNT_4
fields.label: Extra Mount 4
fields.help: Optional extra bind mount for the main Immich server in the format /host/path:/container/path or /host/path:/container/path:ro.

fields.name: IMMICH_EXTRA_MOUNT_5
fields.label: Extra Mount 5
fields.help: Optional extra bind mount for the main Immich server in the format /host/path:/container/path or /host/path:/container/path:ro.

fields.name: IMMICH_SERVER_CONTAINER_NAME
fields.label: Server Container Name
fields.help: EasyDocker names the main Immich server container from the project name.

fields.name: IMMICH_ML_CONTAINER_NAME
fields.label: Machine Learning Container Name
fields.help: EasyDocker names the machine-learning container from the project name.

fields.name: IMMICH_REDIS_CONTAINER_NAME
fields.label: Redis Container Name
fields.help: EasyDocker names the Redis container from the project name.

fields.name: IMMICH_DB_CONTAINER_NAME
fields.label: Database Container Name
fields.help: EasyDocker names the Postgres container from the project name.

fields.name: IMMICH_REDIS_IMAGE
fields.label: Redis Image
fields.help: Recipe-managed Redis image used by Immich.

fields.name: IMMICH_DATABASE_IMAGE
fields.label: Database Image
fields.help: Recipe-managed Postgres image used by Immich.

fields.name: IMMICH_UPLOAD_TARGET
fields.label: Upload Target Path Inside Container
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal upload path.

fields.name: LOCALTIME_BIND
fields.label: Localtime Bind Mount
fields.help: Passes the host timezone file into the container.

fields.name: IMMICH_DB_HOSTNAME
fields.label: Internal Database Hostname
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal service name for Postgres.

fields.name: IMMICH_DB_PORT
fields.label: Internal Database Port
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal Postgres port.

fields.name: IMMICH_REDIS_HOSTNAME
fields.label: Internal Redis Hostname
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal Redis service name.

fields.name: IMMICH_REDIS_PORT
fields.label: Internal Redis Port
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal Redis port.

fields.name: IMMICH_INTERNAL_PORT
fields.label: Internal App Port
fields.help: Recipe-managed Immich app port inside the container.

fields.name: IMMICH_DEPENDS_ON_REDIS
fields.label: Depends On: Redis
fields.help: Ensures the Immich server waits for Redis.

fields.name: IMMICH_DEPENDS_ON_DATABASE
fields.label: Depends On: Database
fields.help: Ensures the Immich server waits for Postgres.

fields.name: IMMICH_MODEL_CACHE_TARGET
fields.label: Model Cache Path Inside Container
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal model cache path.

fields.name: IMMICH_REDIS_HEALTHCHECK_TEST
fields.label: Redis Healthcheck Command
fields.help: Recipe-managed Redis healthcheck command.

fields.name: IMMICH_POSTGRES_INITDB_ARGS
fields.label: Postgres Init Arguments
fields.help: Recipe-managed Postgres initialization arguments.

fields.name: IMMICH_DB_DATA_TARGET
fields.label: Database Path Inside Container
fields.help: Recipe-managed internal Postgres data path.

fields.name: IMMICH_DB_SHM_SIZE
fields.label: Database Shared Memory Size
fields.help: Recipe-managed shared memory size for Postgres.

ui.overview: Immich installs the web app, machine learning service, Redis, and Postgres together as one stack.
what_happens: Four containers will be created as one compose project
Your photos and videos will be stored in the library folder you choose
Postgres and model cache data will be stored in their own folders
The web app will open on the port you choose
You can optionally add up to five extra bind mounts to the main Immich server
ui.data_location: Each storage field can be relative to this app's config folder or an absolute path.
